flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Prince George's Community College rose 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.5k → $10.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Prince George's Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).
